name: Follow-Up Survey (Past Clients)
description: Maintain client relationship and gather feedback 3-6 months post-closing
public_description: Please provide feedback regarding the experience since closing to assist in evaluating satisfaction and identifying potential improvements

questions.label: How's your new home treating you?
Have you made any major updates or changes?
Would you like homeowner resources or vendor recommendations?
How likely are you to refer us to someone looking to buy or sell?
Can we feature your testimonial on our site?

config.placeholder: Example: We loved working with the team — everything was smooth from start to finish!
